title: HARP PlanGraph wire contract
description: The kilobyte-scale JSON DAG the cloud planner (NAT ReWOO) emits to the edge executor. One codec, both sides (plan_emitter.to_wire / from_wire). 'decision' is the HARP wire name for NAT's native 'tier_decision' field; value 'undecided' == RouteDecision.AUTO and signals the edge router to resolve the tier. Grounding: NeMo Agent Toolkit DAG doc (deferred tier idiom), harp_contract.py freeze.

decision.description: local/escalate = planner pin (honored as-is). undecided = AUTO; edge PolicyRouter resolves via the calibrated gate. Planner SHOULD emit 'undecided' by default and pin only when structurally certain.

depends_on.description: Antecedent step_ids. Must reference existing steps; graph must be acyclic (validated at emit time via topo_order).
